---
title: "Spatial Risk Premia in Residential Real Estate"
author: 
  - name: Leandro Gorno
    affiliation: Universidad de los Andes
  - name: Felipe S. Iachan
    affiliation: FGV EPGE
  - name: Ana Paula Ruhe
    affiliation: FGV EPGE
date: "2026"

# Google Scholar metadata - CRITICAL for indexing
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta name="citation_title" content="Spatial Risk Premia in Residential Real Estate">
        <meta name="citation_author" content="Gorno, Leandro">
        <meta name="citation_author" content="Iachan, Felipe S.">
        <meta name="citation_author" content="Ruhe, Ana Paula">
        <meta name="citation_publication_date" content="2026">

page-layout: article
toc: false
---

## Status

*Work in Progress*. Draft and slides available upon request.

> **Former title:** "Urban growth risk and prices: A dynamic spatial theory"

## Authors

- **Leandro Gorno** ([website](https://sites.google.com/site/leandrogorno/))
- **Felipe S. Iachan** (FGV EPGE)
- **Ana Paula Ruhe** ([website](https://sites.google.com/view/anapaularuhe/home))
